{"query":"Novak Djokovic Wimbledon 2026 quarterfinal Roman Safiullin result score 17th quarterfinal","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1519,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"Spirited qualifier Roman Safiullin pushed the seven-time champion hard on Centre Court, but Djokovic ultimately found another gear to claim a 7-6(6), 6-3, 3-6, 6-3 victory and reach his ninth consecutive quarter-final at the grass-court major, and his 17th overall.Jul 5, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roman_Safiullin","title":"Roman Safiullin - Wikipedia","content":"He is a Grand Slam Junior champion, having won the 2015 Australian Open over Hong Seong-chan.
His biggest junior title, after his Australian Open title, is the Grade A Trofeo Bonfiglio where he beat Andrey Rublev in the final.
Safiullin made his Grand Slam debut at the 2021 Australian Open after qualifying and reached the second round by defeating Ilya Ivashka.
After qualifying, he beat 7th seed Alexei Popyrin and fellow qualifier Tomáš Macháč to reach his first ATP Tour-level quarterfinal.
2023–2024: Major quarterfinal, ATP final & top 5 win, top 50
Safiullin made his Masters 1000 debut at the 2023 BNP Paribas Open but lost to Ilya Ivashka.
He qualified for his next Masters 1000 at the Italian Open and also on his debut reached the third round, defeating two Americans, Marcos Giron and upsetting 22nd seed Sebastian Korda before losing to Australian Alexei Popyrin.
At the 2023 Wimbledon Championships he defeated 20th seed Roberto Bautista Agut, Corentin Moutet, Guido Pella and 26th seed Denis Shapovalov to reach the quarterfinals of a Major for the first time.
At the 2023 Rolex Shanghai Masters he reached the third round upsetting this time ninth seed Alexander Zverev, his second career top-10 win.
As a result he reached the top 40 in the rankings on 6 November 2023.
132, he reached the fourth round at the 2026 Wimbledon Championships, upsetting 24th seed Joao Fonseca, after qualifying for the main draw.
Safiullin had no tour-level wins in 2026 prior to the grass-court major, having cut short his 2025 season after the 2025 US Open due to injury.
